text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian enjoys a splendid victory at the
Arima Kinen. Biwa Hayahide is blown away by her
younger sister's performance and expresses her
admiration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun asserts that she'll win next time
in no uncertain terms. Biwa Hayahide says the
same—it seems there is no shortage of
competitors to face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is far from satisfied. Thinking of the
future and competing against the next generation
of racers, she has a tremendous urge to run.
